generated_oml:
instance CartStepperMotor : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Step­per motor driving the cart horizontally along the rail, controlled by MQTT topics, with current and speed limits defined in firmware."
]
instance HoistStepperMotor : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Stepper motor controlling vertical hoist movement, addressed individually via MQTT topics."
]

instance SwingAngleEncoderSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Swing‑angle encoder mounted on the trolley capturing angular deviation of the crane boom, publishing readings over Eclipse Mosquitto MQTT broker."
    DTDFVocab:producedData SwingAngleMqttData
]
instance CartPositionEncoderSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Cart‑position encoder measuring horizontal displacement along the rail, publishing telemetry via MQTT."
    DTDFVocab:producedData CartPositionMqttData
]
instance HoistLevelSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Hoist‑level sensor indicating vertical lift position, publishing measurements over the MQTT broker."
    DTDFVocab:producedData HoistLevelMqttData
]

instance SwingAngleMqttData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom SwingAngleEncoderSensor
]
instance CartPositionMqttData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom CartPositionEncoderSensor
]
instance HoistLevelMqttData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom HoistLevelSensor
]

instance SwingAngleTimeseriesData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Timeseries database entry for swing angle measurements stored in TimescaleDB."
    DTDFVocab:fromData SwingAngleMqttData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo TimescaleDBStorageEnabler
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DataVisualizationEnabler
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulationEnabler
]
instance CartPositionTimeseriesData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Timeseries database entry for cart position measurements stored in TimescaleDB."
    DTDFVocab:fromData CartPositionMqttData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo TimescaleDBStorageEnabler
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DataVisualizationEnabler
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulationEnabler
]
instance HoistLevelTimeseriesData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Timeseries database entry for hoist level measurements stored in TimescaleDB."
    DTDFVocab:fromData HoistLevelMqttData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo TimescaleDBStorageEnabler
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DataVisualizationEnabler
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulationEnabler
]

instance GantryCartSimulationModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Behavioral simulation model of the gantry crane’s cart subsystem, ingesting real‑time sensor streams."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulationEnabler
]
instance GantryHoistSimulationModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Behavioral simulation model of the gantry crane’s hoist subsystem, ingesting real‑time sensor streams."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulationEnabler
]
instance KinematicTrajectoryModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Kinematic model used for optimal control trajectory execution."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ControlExecutionEnabler
]
instance OnlinePredictionModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Online prediction engine that processes historical and current state to output future predictions."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulationEnabler
]

instance MQTTDataIngestionEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Enabler that consumes MQTT data streams from sensors for further processing."
]
instance TimescaleDBStorageEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Enabler that persists sensor data streams into TimescaleDB time‑series database."
    DTDFVocab:enables HistoricalDataLoggingService
]
instance SimulationEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Enabler that feeds data and models into the simulation execution pipeline."
    DTDFVocab:enables SimulationExecutionService
]
instance ControlExecutionEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Enabler that supplies kinematic model to optimal control trajectory execution service."
    DTDFVocab:enables OptimalControlTrajectoryExecutionService
]
instance DataVisualizationEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Enabler that forwards stored timeseries data to Grafana dashboards over MQTT."
    DTDFVocab:enables DataVisualizationDashboardService
]
instance ContinuousValidationEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Enabler that validates real‑time measurements against simulation outputs."
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeMonitoringService
]
instance AlertingEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Enabler that triggers alerts when key metrics deviate beyond predefined thresholds."
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeMonitoringService
]

instance RealTimeMonitoringService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Continuous validation service that monitors real‑time telemetry against simulation predictions and alerts operators."
    DTDFVocab:provides ContinuousValidationInsight, SendAlertAction
]
instance OptimalControlTrajectoryExecutionService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service that executes optimal control trajectories via the kinematic model on the physical crane."
    DTDFVocab:provides ExecuteControlTrajectoryAction
]
instance HistoricalDataLoggingService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service that logs system states and commands for historical analysis in TimescaleDB."
    DTDFVocab:provides HistoricalDataLoggingInsight
]
instance DataVisualizationDashboardService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service that provides runtime visualization dashboards connected to MQTT broker, including Grafana dashboards."
    DTDFVocab:provides VisualizationInsight
]
instance ControlStrategyEvolutionService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service that supports evolution of control strategies, enabling researchers to test fault‑detection, synchronization, and control optimization."
    DTDFVocab:provides ControlStrategyEvolutionInsight
]
instance SimulationExecutionService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service that executes simulation models of cart and hoist subsystems for online prediction and validation."
    DTDFVocab:provides StatePredictionInsight
]

instance ContinuousValidationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insight indicating continuous validation status of real‑time measurements versus simulation predictions."
]
instance StatePredictionInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insight providing predictions of future system state based on online prediction engine."
]
instance VisualizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insight displaying real‑time telemetry and historical data in dashboards."
]
instance ControlStrategyEvolutionInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insight showing performance of evolving control strategies during experiments."
]
instance HistoricalDataLoggingInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insight indicating logging of historical data into TimescaleDB."
]

instance SendAlertAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Action that sends alerts to operators on the dashboard when key metrics exceed thresholds."
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]
instance ExecuteControlTrajectoryAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Action that initiates execution of the optimal control trajectory on the crane."
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance LabScaleGantryCraneEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:contains CartStepMotorComponent, HoistStepMotorComponent, SwingAngleEncoderComponent, CartPositionEncoderComponent, HoistLevelSensorComponent
]

instance CartStepMotorComponent : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Physical cart stepper motor component of the gantry crane."
]
instance HoistStepMotorComponent : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Physical hoist stepper motor component."
]
instance SwingAngleEncoderComponent : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Swing‑angle encoder component mounted on the trolley."
]
instance CartPositionEncoderComponent : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Cart position encoder component mounted on the rail."
]
instance HoistLevelSensorComponent : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Hoist level sensor component mounted on the vertical column."
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "The Control Application sends motion commands to the Physical Crane Interface, which translates them into controller‑specific instructions and forwards them to the crane hardware. Feedback from the hardware is received by the Physical Crane Interface, passed to the Logging Application, and stored in TimescaleDB, allowing operators and validation services to confirm execution. The Digital Twin services (Trajectory Generator, Simulation, Continuous Validation) provide optimal trajectory or motion plans that the Control Application consumes and sends as commands to the crane."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "The architecture follows a C4 container model. Containers include: (1) Physical Crane – the physical hardware with controller; (2) Control Application – a Python microservice orchestrating operations; (3) Trajectory Generator Service – a Python microservice generating trajectories and communicating via MQTT; (4) Database – a TimescaleDB (or PostgreSQL) instance for continuous logging; (5) MQTT Broker – mediating message exchange between services; (6) Logging Application – a Python component that continuously records crane state; (7) Continuous Validation Service – a Python component that continuously compares sensor measurements to the digital model; and (8) Human‑Machine Interface – a web dashboard presenting real‑time status. All components are containerized or virtualised, using container orchestration for scalability, and the Digital Twin orchestrates interactions via the MQTT broker, coordinating control flow, data persistence, and validation across the system."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "A Continuous Validation Service runs continuously, comparing real‑time sensor measurements with the simulation’s predicted state. It computes general distance metrics between measured and simulated values; if a threshold is exceeded, it notifies operators. The service thus provides ongoing model validation by ensuring the twin’s behavior stays within acceptable bounds."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "All Digital Twin components communicate via an MQTT broker that acts as the central message bus. This broker supports publish–subscribe interactions between the Trajectory Generator, Simulation, Continuous Validation, Logging, and Dashboard services. The document does not specify further details on network topology, bandwidth, latency, reliability, or security protocols beyond the use of MQTT."
]

instance dt_hosting_deployment : DTDFVocab:Deployment [
    base:desc "All Python components (Physical Crane Interface, Control Application, Logging Application, Trajectory Generator Service, Simulation Service, Continuous Validation Service, Dashboard) are bundled into a single Python module named gantrylib for deployment simplicity. For ease of deployment, the TimescaleDB, MQTT broker, and Grafana Dashboard are containerized with Docker and run locally on the operator’s environment (no explicit cloud or edge deployment is described). Computational resource requirements are not quantified in the document; scalability, reliability, and availability mechanisms are not mentioned beyond the inference that Docker containers provide isolation for the database, broker, and dashboard.
"
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "The system adopts open‑source industry standards: MQTT for publish/subscribe communication, TimescaleDB (PostgreSQL) for time‑series storage, Docker containers for deployment portability, and RESTful HTTP interfaces for service access. No formal certification or additional interoperability standards beyond MQTT are reported."
]
